---
title: Home Work 1
subtitle: 10th March 2026
format: html
---

This is our first homework assignment for this season where you will address the following questions and submit your GitHub link containing either a Jupyter Notebook or a Python file

#### Question 1 - A factory claims their machines fill bags with exactly 200g of rice. You sample 36 bags and find a mean of 197g with a standard deviation of 12g. At α = 0.05, is there evidence the machine is underfilling?

Set up H₀ and H₁. Compute the test statistic. Make a decision.


#### Question 2 - Your friend says “a p-value of 0.001 means there’s a 0.1% chance the null hypothesis is true.”

Is your friend correct? Explain in your own words.

------------------------------------------------ Happy Learning -----------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<script src="https://giscus.app/client.js"
        data-repo="ArunKoundinya/AIBasicswithAK"
        data-repo-id="R_kgDOLXPVRw"
        data-category="General"
        data-category-id="DIC_kwDOLXPVR84CdeVx"
        data-mapping="pathname"
        data-strict="0"
        data-reactions-enabled="1"
        data-emit-metadata="0"
        data-input-position="bottom"
        data-theme="purple_dark"
        data-lang="en"
        crossorigin="anonymous"
        async>
</script>
```
